rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday December 20, 2019 Line 11. DEFENDANT IAN ROSS, CAL ESCUE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MONIQUE DEFEBAUGH VS. JEREMY WELLAND ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday December 20, 2019 Line 12. DEFENDANT JEREMY WELLAND, CHRISTINE WELLAND DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT No later than 9:00 a.m. on December 20, 2019 Plaintiff shall provide a copy of the operative notice with portions asserting that the dominant motive for recovering possession is one of the enumerated grounds. If Plaintiff is not able to point to such language in the Notice, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to plead the dominant motive in the body of the Complaint. If such language appears in the Notice, which is incorporated into the Complaint, the demurrer is overruled. =(501/CFH)
